items.title: Write Up All Web Challenges CTF Hackthebox Cyber Apocalypse 2022
items.content_text:
Prologue CTF Hackthebox Cyber Apocalypse is an international competition held every year by Hack The Box. This CTF Competition is using Jeopardy-style, which means every teams must find a flag in the given challenge. This competition lasts for six days.
Write Up Kryptos Support (300 pts) The value of this challenge is 300 points and +1000 players have solved this challenge.
We’re given a website with an interface like this.
